---
title: "Predicción del metajuego en Clash Royale usando inteligencia artificial con datos de 2023-2026"
author:
  - "Cajas Molina Robinson Stalin"
  - "Baraja Simbaña Cristian Paul"
date: today
lang: es
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: report
    fontsize: 12pt
    geometry:
      - margin=2.54cm
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: black
    urlcolor: black
    citecolor: black
    toc: false
    linestretch: 1.5
    mainfont: "Times New Roman"
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \let\maketitle\relax
        \usepackage{indentfirst}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titleformat{\chapter}[display]
        {\normalfont\huge\bfseries}
        {\centering\chaptertitlename\ \thechapter}
        {1ex}
        {\raggedright}
        \titlespacing*{\chapter}{0pt}{50pt}{40pt}

bibliography: chapters/referencias.bib
csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
filters:
  - diagram
diagram:
  engine:
    plantuml:
      mime-type: image/png
---

{{< include chapters/_portada.qmd >}}

\tableofcontents
\newpage
{{< include chapters/_resumen.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_capitulo1.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_marco_teorico.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_seleccion_modelos.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_proceso_experimental.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_resultados.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_resultados_avanzados.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_evaluacion.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_seleccion_final.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_construccion_aplicativo.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/_conclusiones.qmd >}}
